title: Review before applying
summary: Generation should create candidates, comparisons, and plans that stay outside the deck until accepted.
note: This section is about decision surfaces, not automatic rewrites.

cards.title: Candidates
cards.body: Generate options without replacing the current slide.

cards.title: Compare
cards.body: Inspect current, proposed, and changed fields together.

cards.title: Plan
cards.body: Change the deck above one slide when the story needs it.
